description: One who tells stories; a keeper and sharer of narratives. 'Lophae' names who carries tales—voice weaving worlds from words.
sound_symbolism: The word opens with narrative. 'Lo' opens with story-space, tale beginning. 'Pha' breathes with gentle weaving, narrative flowing. Then 'e' eases into shared wonder.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo lophae' (the storyteller). Shares 'nophi' (story). Related to 'weru' (poet) as narrative to verse.

pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Storyteller as memory—carrier of culture through narrative tradition.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Storyteller as teacher—wisdom transmitted through tale and parable.
